## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] Docs or release notes updated when behavior changed

## Runtime Contract

- [ ] No change to runtime contract
- [ ] Runtime contract change is documented and tested

## Security Boundary

- [ ] No change to security-sensitive behavior
- [ ] Security boundary change is documented and tested
